title: Bicarb Burrito
description: A vegan-friendly, peppery, silky mexican dish featuring bicarbonate of soda for a unique baking twist thats perfect for sick-day comfort food.
instructions: Mix bicarb of soda with vegetable broth in a saucepan and bring to a simmer until dissolved, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Heat vegan cheese sauce over low heat if necessary, then pour into cooled bicarb mixture. Stir gently until combined thoroughly.
Warm tortillas on a skillet or iron skillet until soft and pliable but not overly toasted.
Lay out warmed tortillas and spoon the bicarb cheese sauce evenly across each one. Add diced bell peppers (if using) for extra flavor and texture.
